cases.question: Find all organizations that are mentioned in articles with highly negative sentiment (sentiment < -0.5). Return each organization name and the count of such articles mentioning it, ordered by count descending.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(org:Organization)
WHERE a.sentiment < -0.5
RETURN org.name AS organization, count(a) AS negativeArticleCount
ORDER BY negativeArticleCount DESC

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: Find pairs of organizations that are both mentioned in the same article. Return the two organization names and the number of articles they co-appear in, ordered by co-appearance count descending, limited to 10 pairs.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o1:Organization),
      (a:Article)-[:MENTIONS]->(o2:Organization)
WHERE o1.name < o2.name
WITH o1.name AS org1, o2.name AS org2, count(DISTINCT a) AS coAppearances
RETURN org1, org2, coAppearances
ORDER BY coAppearances DESC
LIMIT 10

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: For each top-level organization (not a subsidiary), return its name and the average sentiment of all articles that mention it. Only include organizations with at least 3 articles. Order by average sentiment ascending.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (o:Organization)
WHERE NOT EXISTS { (o)<-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]-() }
MATCH (o)<-[:MENTIONS]-(a:Article)
WITH o, avg(a.sentiment) AS avgSentiment, count(a) AS articleCount
WHERE articleCount >= 3
RETURN o.name AS organization, avgSentiment
ORDER BY avgSentiment ASC

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: Search for organizations by name using the fulltext index. Find all organizations whose name contains 'tech' (case-insensitive). Return name and description.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
CALL db.index.fulltext.queryNodes('entity', 'tech') YIELD node, score
WHERE node:Organization
RETURN node.name AS name, node.description AS description
ORDER BY score DESC

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: Find all direct and indirect subsidiaries of 'Blackstone' (up to 2 hops through HAS_SUBSIDIARY relationships). Use a literal string match. Return distinct subsidiary names, limited to 20.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (:Organization {name: 'Blackstone'})-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]-{1,2}(sub:Organization)
RETURN DISTINCT sub.name AS subsidiaryName
LIMIT 20

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: Use a CALL subquery to find, for each of the top 5 most-mentioned organizations, the title and sentiment of their most recent article (highest sentiment). Return organization name, article title, and sentiment.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (org:Organization)<-[:MENTIONS]-(a:Article)
WITH org, count(a) AS mentionCount
ORDER BY mentionCount DESC
LIMIT 5
CALL (org) {
  MATCH (org)<-[:MENTIONS]-(a:Article)
  RETURN a.title AS articleTitle, a.sentiment AS sentiment
  ORDER BY a.sentiment DESC
  LIMIT 1
}
RETURN org.name AS organization, articleTitle, sentiment
ORDER BY sentiment DESC

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: Count the total number of Chunk nodes linked to articles that mention organizations in the database. Return the count.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (org:Organization)<-[:MENTIONS]-(a:Article)-[:HAS_CHUNK]->(c:Chunk)
RETURN count(DISTINCT c) AS totalChunks

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: Find organizations that have at least one subsidiary AND are mentioned in at least one article. Return their name and the count of subsidiaries, ordered by subsidiary count descending.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (org:Organization)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(sub:Organization)
WITH org, count(sub) AS subsidiaryCount
WHERE EXISTS { MATCH (org)<-[:MENTIONS]-(:Article) }
RETURN org.name AS name, subsidiaryCount
ORDER BY subsidiaryCount DESC

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected

cases.question: Write the correct MERGE pattern for upserting an Organization by name. Use MERGE (o:Organization {name: 'Nexus Corp'}) with ON CREATE SET and ON MATCH SET to set nbrEmployees = 500 in both cases. Return o.name and elementId(o). Note: this demonstrates the MERGE pattern — the harness validates syntax (Gate 1) but the demo DB is read-only so Gate 2 may be skipped.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MERGE (o:Organization {name: 'Nexus Corp'})
ON CREATE SET o.nbrEmployees = 500
ON MATCH SET o.nbrEmployees = 500
RETURN o.name, elementId(o)

cases.question: Find the organization with the most subsidiaries (direct only, not transitive). Return the organization name and the count of its direct subsidiaries.
cases.generated_cypher:
CYPHER 25
MATCH (parent:Organization)-[:HAS_SUBSIDIARY]->(subsidiary:Organization)
RETURN parent.name AS organization, count(subsidiary) AS subsidiaryCount
ORDER BY subsidiaryCount DESC
LIMIT 1

gate_details.reason: No deprecated syntax or operators detected
